Shi Zuan ŚłęÁļā
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Zuan (ŚłęÁļā). Joined Deng Ai‚Äôs attack on the Riverlands. Was made Imperial Protector of Yizhou. Shi Zuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
